CustomField.description: Semicolon-delimited list of required co-permits and authorizations identified from the NEPA Permit Matrix for this project sector and type. Populated automatically by NEPA_Permit_Coordinator flow when nepa_review_type__c is set. Coordinator should verify and supplement as needed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required permits identified from sector/type matrix. Verify and supplement before advancing to scoping.
CustomField.label: Co-Permits Required
